text: The most superstitious man in Paraguayan politics - Politico
fullText: After traveling to the U.S. for his team's first match, President Santiago Peña won't go back near the stadium today — but he'll gladly declare a holiday from his living room.

text: In Mount Rushmore speech, Trump veers from U.S. exceptionalism to warnings about communism - NPR
fullText: President Trump ushered in America's 250th anniversary with a darkly political speech that swerved from the typically apolitical, unifying speeches past presidents have given to mark Independence Day.

text: New DNA technology leads to identification of Revolutionary War soldier: "A gift to the whole country" - CBS News

text: Joey Chestnut, Miki Sudo devour field to defend hot dog titles - ESPN
fullText: Record holder Joey Chestnut took down 66 hot dogs to claim the Mustard Belt for the 18th time, while Miki Sudo downed 38.75 hot dogs for her record 12th victory.

text: 55-year-old sandwich chain closes restaurants with no notice - thestreet.com

text: Masked men with Confederate flags seen chanting, marching, riding Metro in DC - NBC4 Washington
